title: Labubu Entity Mod
description: That little monster as a peaceful creature
body:
# **_This is not affiliated with Pop Mart nor Kasing Lung_**

## Those tiktok dolls are pretty cute.

These Labubus are silly little monsters that make ~~annoying~~ cute cries. There are 6 Labubu's in this mod: Brown, Blue, Red, Yellow, Purple, and Green. 

![The Different Labubus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d98e1c78b1fcb3755ff2e6dc5085fa224ac5e13d.webp)

## They have a crafting recipe to make their respected egg.

Use 5 wool of one of the five Labubu colors and a nether star in the middle to gain the egg.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc33637f69b0956460a0e7943b131fc091bd5ce9.png)

## They drop the devil's gems

Labubus drop nethar quarts and are breedable with nether warts.

## They like their warm baths.

Labubus are resistant to much of the heat, including a dragon's breath

## Little Cuties!!

![God of all labubus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05dd5ef416d92641148fa8b85766b899cf17b505.webp)

![Where is the Labubu? I can't find him!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a4f6dc79711f23862ec52a8023bbf5f18b3fdd.webp)
